calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Virool, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Adroll, Inc.
Michael Zininberg, Global Lead of Credit and Collections for plaintif Adroll, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Virool, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on August 28, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 4, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Adroll, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Virool, Inc., a Delaware corporation, as follows:

Damages - $58,208.93.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,735.75.
Attorney Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $581.00.
Total - $67,325.68.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-18-2018 Continued To Feb-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2017 Continued To Apr-04-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
